{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Research Center
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Research Center]] is a magical fortress resembling a large, half-melted glass [[pyramid]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c43">''The Pilot'', chapter 43</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
